message:
bd-d4m5k perf: emit rich bench scorecard

Add comprehensive-bench JSON schema v3 with avg-ratio compatibility, geomean, median, p90/p99, canonical scenario categories, and per-category weighted primary score emission.

Validation: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fsqlite_cod4 cargo test -p fsqlite-e2e --bin comprehensive-bench; rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fsqlite_cod4 cargo clippy -p fsqlite-e2e --bin comprehensive-bench --no-deps -- -D warnings; rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fsqlite_cod4 cargo fmt -p fsqlite-e2e --check. Full clippy with deps is blocked by unrelated dirty fsqlite-planner manual_clamp at crates/fsqlite-planner/src/lib.rs:597.
